parameters.query: SELECT session_data, passo_atual, updated_at, expires_at FROM auto.booking_session WHERE remote_jid = $1 AND instance_name = $2 AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO auto.booking_session (remote_jid, instance_name, organizacao_id, session_data, passo_atual, updated_at, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours') ON CONFLICT (remote_jid, instance_name) DO UPDATE SET session_data = $4::jsonb, passo_atual = $5, updated_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours';

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Extrair Parâmetros').item.json.remote_jid }},={{ $('Extrair Parâmetros').item.json.instance_name }},={{ $('Extrair Parâmetros').item.json.organizacao_id }},={{ JSON.stringify($('Extrair Parâmetros').item.json.session_data || {}) }},={{ $('Extrair Parâmetros').item.json.passo_atual || 1 }}

parameters.query: DELETE FROM auto.booking_session WHERE remote_jid = $1 AND instance_name = $2;
